name: StepChallenge
description: StepChallenge is a fitness app that encourages users to take more steps and engage in physical activity. It provides challenges, rewards, and social features to motivate users to move more.
features: Step tracking with daily and weekly challenges
Reward system with badges and leaderboards
Social features to connect with friends and join step challenges
target_audience: Individuals who want to increase their physical activity and improve their overall health
